name: Hawaiian Mood Cookies
recipeIngredient: 1/2 cup Maraschino cherries, pitted and drained
recipeInstructions:
1. Blend together margarine, cream cheese, and vanilla extract in a bowl.
2. Add sugar and mix well until smooth.
3. Add eggs one at a time, beating thoroughly after each addition.
4. Gradually add sifted dry ingredients (flour, baking powder, salt) to the mixture.
5. Mix everything together until thoroughly combined.
6. Stir in the crushed pineapple, maraschino cherries, and chopped nuts.
7. Shape the dough into four equal portions.
8. Form each portion into an accordian pleated log by rolling it tightly around a wooden dowel or pencil.
9. Place the logs on a baking sheet lined with parchment paper.
10. Bake at 350°F (175°C) for 15 minutes, or until set and golden brown.
11. Remove from the oven and let cool slightly before cutting into rounds.
12. To release the cookies easily, gently loosen the foil from one end of each log and pull it out to pop the cookies off the baking sheet.
